patches.rationale: DOI 10.1029/2020GL087323 returns 404 from CrossRef — fabricated or incorrect citation. Replacement: Alken et al. (2021) IGRF-13 paper, DOI: 10.1186/s40623-021-01569-z, verified to resolve. Documents SAA state including the African lobe emergence at ~20S 10E. Citation year updated from 2020 to 2021 to match the actual paper. Curmudgeon WIN-057b.c1 critical finding.
